# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = paris_commune
paris_commune.5 = {
	type = country_event
	placement = root
	event_image = {
		video = "europenorthamerica_springtime_of_nations"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_military.dds"

	title = paris_commune.5.t
	desc = paris_commune.5.d
	flavor = paris_commune.5.f

	duration = 3

	dlc = dlc004

	trigger = {
		#Triggered by JE
	}

	immediate = {
		c:FRA ?= {
			save_scope_as = france_scope
		}
		ROOT = {
			save_scope_as = recogniser_scope
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = paris_commune.5.a
		default_option = yes
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
			modifier = {
				trigger = {
					scope:france_scope.relations:root >= relations_threshold:cordial
				}
				add = 50
			}
		}
		change_relations = {
			country = scope:france_scope
			value = 10
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = paris_commune.5.b
		ai_chance = {
			base = 15
			modifier = {
				trigger = {
					scope:france_scope.relations:root <= relations_threshold:poor
				}
				add = 30
			}
			modifier = {
				trigger = {
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
				}
				add = 250
			}
			modifier = {
				trigger = {
					scope:france_scope = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						NOR = {
							has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
							has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
						}
					}
					NOR = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
					}
					OR = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
					}
				}
				add = 10
			}
		}
		change_relations = {
			country = scope:france_scope
			value = -25
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				ROOT = {
					country_rank >= rank_value:great_power
				}
			}
			c:FRA ?= {
				change_variable = { name = PRC_recognition_level add = 1 }  # Variable exists only for display purposes
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				ROOT = {
					country_rank >= rank_value:major_power
				}
			}
			c:FRA ?= {
				change_variable = { name = PRC_recognition_level add = 0.5 } # Variable exists only for display purposes
			}
		}
		scope:france_scope = {
			post_notification = foreign_country_supports_commune
		}
		custom_tooltip = will_improve_commune_progress_tt
	}
	option = {
		name = paris_commune.5.c
		ai_chance = {
			base = 75
		}
		change_relations = {
			country = scope:france_scope
			value = -5
		}
	}
}
